# Epm

**Summary**: A technique used to determine the chemical composition of minerals within a rock sample.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] used EPMA to determine major element compositions of minerals in the xenoliths.

## Key Results and Findings

- The analysis was performed using a JEOL JXA–8600 SX EPMA with energy dispersive spectroscopy (INCA–6025). ([[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023, p. 49]])
